stereo_removed.interpretation: Stereo removal destroys configuration information. Binary agreement with the original ACS label measures apparent label retention, not recovery of the erased stereoisomer.

supplied_stereo.interpretation: Binary whole-molecule mirror comparison on supplied input.

binary_reference.warning: This measures positive recall only: RotA supplies no achiral controls and its SMILES does not encode atropisomer configuration.

rdkit_smiles.reason: backend does not predict RotA axial atom-pair/chain loci from the supplied 2D SMILES

stereomolgraph.reason: backend does not predict RotA axial atom-pair/chain loci from the supplied 2D SMILES

synkit.reason: backend does not predict RotA axial atom-pair/chain loci from the supplied 2D SMILES

stereo_removed.interpretation: Stereo removal destroys configuration information. Binary agreement with the original ACS label measures apparent label retention, not recovery of the erased stereoisomer.

supplied_stereo.interpretation: Binary whole-molecule mirror comparison on supplied input.

binary_reference.warning: Do not present as an independent published 300-case global benchmark until the 35 added labels receive chemistry review.

stereomolgraph.reason: StereoMolGraph represents relative stereo but exposes no R/S/r/s/M/P/m/p/E/Z CIP label assignment API

synkit.reason: SynKit has no independent full CIP assignment backend; stored RDKit CIP properties are not a separate method

stereo_removed.interpretation: Stereo removal destroys configuration information. Binary agreement with the original ACS label measures apparent label retention, not recovery of the erased stereoisomer.

supplied_stereo.interpretation: Binary whole-molecule mirror comparison on supplied input.

methods.rdkit_smiles: publisher method: invert RDKit tetrahedral atom tags and compare canonical isomeric SMILES
methods.stereomolgraph: Chem.AddHs outside timing; from_rdmol with stereo_complete=True; compare graph with enantiomer
methods.synkit: complete eligible sp3, even-cumulene, and biaryl-axis topology with isotope-aware identity; test exact stereo-aware mirror graph isomorphism
